description: Greenfield Next.js 15 todo app with Prisma + SQLite, Tailwind shadcn UI, Vitest tests.
task_description: Build a Next.js 15 todo app with App Router. Use Prisma + SQLite for storage, shadcn/ui for components, Vitest for tests. Include CRUD: create, list, toggle complete, delete. Single user (no auth). Should pass `pnpm test` and `pnpm build` with zero errors.
